name: ml-automation-marketplace
description: End-to-end ML automation plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: ml-automation-core
plugins.description: End-to-end ML automation workflow with Extension Protocol. 10 specialized agents, shared report bus, reflection gates, MLOps registry, hook points for extensions, and quality gates.

plugins.name: ml-automation-mmm
plugins.description: Media Mix Modeling extension for ml-automation. Bayesian MMM with adstock, saturation, channel attribution, and client-ready reporting.

plugins.name: ml-automation-snowflake
plugins.description: Snowflake development and ML automation extension. SQL development, Snowpark pipelines, ML training, and deployment to Snowflake Model Registry and Streamlit in Snowflake.

plugins.name: ml-automation-llm
plugins.description: LLM and GenAI automation extension. Prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, LLM evaluation, fine-tuning workflows, and GenAI deployment.

plugins.name: ml-automation-timeseries
plugins.description: Time series analysis and forecasting extension. Prophet, ARIMA, neural forecasting, seasonality decomposition, and anomaly detection.

plugins.name: ml-automation-databricks
plugins.description: Databricks development and ML automation extension. Spark MLlib, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, MLflow integration, and Databricks deployment.

plugins.name: ml-automation-nlp
plugins.description: NLP and text analytics extension. Text preprocessing, embeddings, topic modeling, sentiment analysis, NER, and text classification.

plugins.name: ml-automation-ab-testing
plugins.description: A/B testing and causal inference extension. Experiment design, power analysis, Bayesian A/B testing, and causal impact estimation.

plugins.name: ml-automation-drift
plugins.description: Production monitoring extension. Data drift detection, model drift, PSI/CSI, alerting pipelines, and performance degradation tracking.

plugins.name: ml-automation-explainability
plugins.description: Model explainability and fairness extension. SHAP, LIME, fairness audits, model cards, and regulatory compliance documentation.

plugins.name: ml-automation-aws
plugins.description: AWS ML platform extension. SageMaker training, S3 data management, Lambda deployment, and AWS ML infrastructure automation.

plugins.name: ml-automation-gcp
plugins.description: Google Cloud ML platform extension. Vertex AI training, BigQuery ML, Cloud Storage, Cloud Run deployment, and GCP ML infrastructure.

plugins.name: ml-automation-azure
plugins.description: Azure ML platform extension. Azure ML training, Synapse Analytics, Blob Storage, Azure Functions deployment, and Azure ML infrastructure.

plugins.name: ml-automation-cv
plugins.description: Computer vision extension. Image preprocessing, CNN training, object detection, data augmentation, and CV model deployment.
